entry.title: New: BILL050(24) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO PARADES, STREET FESTIVALS, AND OTHER ACTIVITIES.

Updates the applicable ordinances related to activities that require the exclusive use of streets, including parades, street festivals, and other endeavors. Establishes a mechanism for for-profit parades to meet public purpose requirements. With respect to activities in the Waikiki Special District, reduces the number of permits that the DTS Director may issue per year, and authorizes the Director to issue up to 12 permits for street festivals in the district, including Waikiki legacy street festivals. Provides for administrative cost recovery for multiple applications. Clarifies the Mayor’s authority to grant waivers for activities in the Waikiki Special District. Requires permit applicants to secure appropriate medical services to support the activity. Requires street festival permit applicants to implement a liquor controlled area if alcoholic beverages will be sold. Takes effect on January 1, 2025, and applies to permits issued for 2026 and thereafter.

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
